svg.title: Plaud Embedded SDK architecture — first release
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing the integration flow from Plaud devices through the mobile SDK to Plaud cloud services, with the developer's backend connecting via webhooks and ASR API.

g.text: NotePin / NotePin S / Note / Note Pro
Managed by Plaud — no infra needed

svg.text: Integration flow: Create app in console → get Client ID + Secret Key → install SDK
→ pair device → start recording → transfer audio → receive transcript via webhook
→ (optional) call ASR API server-side for custom processing
